pre_game.message: Hey, I’m J. It’s a bit surreal being in here with everyone, isn't it? What’s your story—what brings you to the game?

Hey J, I’m I. It really is strange being here. Honestly, I’m just looking to win enough to take care of my family and the people I love—it would change everything for us. What about you, what’s your story?
I hear you, I. I'm here for the exact same reason—to give the people I care about a better life and some security. It's a lot of pressure, but I'm determined to make it work.
I completely understand. It’s a lot of pressure to carry, but knowing who we’re doing it for makes it worth it. We’ve just gotta stay focused.
Exactly. It's good to meet someone else with their head on straight. Have you thought much about how you're going to approach the game itself?
Honestly, I’m still trying to feel things out. I figure being observant and staying adaptable is the best way to start. Do you have a specific strategy in mind yet?
I’m playing it by ear too, but I think finding people I can actually trust is going to be the most important part.
I definitely agree; it’s hard to know who’s genuine in a place like this, but having someone you can rely on would make a huge difference.
For sure. It’s early, but I’ve got a good feeling about our conversation so far; maybe we can look out for each other.
I appreciate that, J. I feel the same way. Let’s definitely keep each other in mind once things get started.
Definitely. It’s a deal. Let’s make it happen for our families. Good luck out there.
